pi_items.source: Task description in task.json and VLM verification logic in verifier.py mandate configuring the top plot for channels 1 and 2.
Task description in task.json and VLM verification logic in verifier.py mandate configuring the bottom plot for channels 7 and 8.
Task description in task.json and VLM verification logic in verifier.py specify configuring the Spectrogram widget.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the OpenBCI GUI to run a synthetic session. The Spectrogram widget must be configured with channels 1 and 2 enabled on the top plot, and channels 7 and 8 enabled on the bottom plot.
